title: Chinese Buddhist: Pang Yun: Layman Pang Records (3)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Pang Yun: Layman Pang Records
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Pang Yun: Layman Pang Records

translation.text: From Pang Yun: Layman Pang Records: A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
